intent: Write a short side-by-side on office desk chairs versus standing desk converters for a small-apartment remote worker. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) the One Stop Market shopping site — browse the office-products category and collect at least 3 seating/support products (a chair, a cushion, and one standing or tilt accessory). Record price, rating, and review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/LifeProTips for posts on back pain, chair hacks, or cheap ergonomic fixes; collect at least 2 posts with title, score, and comment count. The report must: (a) compare seated-only versus sit-stand options using the storefront data, (b) inject at least two pieces of community wisdom that would change your pick under space or back-pain constraints, (c) give a single-sentence recommendation for someone working 6 hours a day at a kitchen table. Keep it focused and every claim needs a markdown citation.
author_notes: Easy tier. Focused ergonomics Q, 2 sites. Good smoke test.
